title: Larval Movement
author: Wen Aw
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rxad7ie

steps.title: 48 third instar female larvae from...
steps.instruction: 48 third instar female larvae from each mitotype were placed in 0.5% agar in petri dishes.

steps.title: Individual larvae were then placed in...
steps.instruction: Individual larvae were then placed in quadrants of separate petri dishes.

steps.title: Larvae were observed for 60 seconds...
steps.instruction: Larvae were observed for 60 seconds and larvae trails were immediately traced onto the lid of each dish. The distance moved by each larva was measured independently by two investigators
